briefdescription.para: Determine if a field is present in a JSON object.

simplesect.para: True if the field is present, or false if the field is not present or the JSON object is NULL.

briefdescription.para: Get the value of a string field from a JSON object.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the string if the field exists and is a string, otherwise the empty string ("").
The returned string is a pointer to the string contained in the JSON object. It is not a copy of the string, so once the JSON object is freed, the pointer is no longer valid.

briefdescription.para: Get the value of an array field from a JSON object.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the array, which is itself a JSON object (J *), if the field exists and is an array, otherwise NULL.
The returned JSON object is a pointer to the array contained in the parent JSON object. It is not a copy, so once the parent JSON object is freed, the pointer is no longer valid.

briefdescription.para: Get the value of an object field from a JSON object.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the object, which is itself a JSON object (J *), if the field exists and is an object, otherwise NULL.
The returned JSON object is a pointer to the object contained in the parent JSON object. It is not a copy, so once the parent JSON object is freed, the pointer is no longer valid.

briefdescription.para: Return the boolean representation of an item.

simplesect.para: The boolean value.

briefdescription.para: Return the string representation of an item.

simplesect.para: The string value, or empty string, if NULL.

briefdescription.para: Return the number representation of an item.

simplesect.para: The number, or 0.0, if NULL.

briefdescription.para: Get the floating point value of a number field from a JSON object.

simplesect.para: The value of the number field if the field exists and is a number, otherwise 0.0.
The returned value is the floating point representation of the number.

briefdescription.para: Return the integer representation of an item.

simplesect.para: The number, or 0, if NULL.

briefdescription.para: Get the integer value of a number field from a JSON object.

simplesect.para: The value of the number field if the field exists and is a number, otherwise 0.
The returned value is the integer representation of the number.

briefdescription.para: Get the value of a boolean field from a JSON object.

simplesect.para: The value of the boolean field if it exists and is a boolean, otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: Determine if a JSON object is valid and if a field is not present, or null.

simplesect.para: bool. False if the field is not present, or NULL.

briefdescription.para: Determine if a field exists, is a string and matches a provided value.

parameterdescription.para: The string to test against the returned value.

simplesect.para: bol. Whether the fields match exactly.

briefdescription.para: Determine if a field exists, is a string and contains a provided value.

parameterdescription.para: The string to test against the returned value.

simplesect.para: bol. Whether the provided string is found within the field.

memberdef.argsstring: (J *json, const char *fieldName, const void *binaryData, uint32_t binaryDataLen)
memberdef.name: JAddBinaryToObject

briefdescription.para: Add binary data as a Base64-encoded string field to a JSON object.

parameterdescription.para: The name to use for the field.
A buffer of binary data to encode.
The length of the binary data in bytes.

simplesect.para: True if the string was successfully encoded and added to the object, otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: Decode a Base64-encoded string field in a JSON object and return the decoded bytes.

parameterdescription.para: A pointer to a pointer, used to hold the pointer to the decoded bytes.
A pointer to an unsigned integer, used to hold the length of the decoded bytes.

simplesect.para: True if the string was successfully decoded and returned, otherwise false.
The returned binary buffer must be freed by the user with JFree when it is no longer needed.
On error, the returned binary buffer and data length shall be set to NULL and zero (0), respectively.

briefdescription.para: Get the object name.

simplesect.para: The name, or the empty string, if NULL.

briefdescription.para: Convert an integer to text.

parameterdescription.para: The buffer to hold the text.

simplesect.para: The buffer must be large enough because no bounds checking is done.

briefdescription.para: Convert text to an integer.

simplesect.para: An integer, or 0 if invalid

briefdescription.para: Convert a buffer/len to a null-terminated c-string.

parameterdescription.para: A buffer containing the bytes to convert.
The length of buffer in bytes.

simplesect.para: If buffer is NULL or length 0, the empty string. If allocation fails, NULL. On success, the converted c-string. The returned string must be freed with NoteFree.

briefdescription.para: Return the type of an item, as a string.

simplesect.para: The type

briefdescription.para: Get the type of a field, as an int usable in a switch statement.

parameterdescription.para: The JSON object containing the field.

simplesect.para: The type of the field on success. JTYPE_NOT_PRESENT on error or if the field doesn't exist.

detaileddescription.para: Written by Ray Ozzie and Blues Inc. team.
Copyright (c) 2019 Blues Inc. MIT License. Use of this source code is governed by licenses granted by the copyright holder including that found in the LICENSE file.
